fault_hypothesis: Line 68 uses `>= cutoff` (inclusive) instead of `> cutoff` (exclusive/strict), causing events exactly at the cutoff boundary to be incorrectly included in the results.

spec.expr: all(t > cutoff__1 for t in [t for t in timestamps if t >= cutoff__1])

constraints.intent: Every returned timestamp must be strictly greater than the cutoff, not equal to it.
The cutoff must equal now minus window so boundary semantics are correct.

spec.expr: not any(t == cutoff__1 for t in timestamps) or len([t for t in timestamps if t >= cutoff__1]) < len([t for t in timestamps if t == cutoff__1]) + len([t for t in timestamps if t > cutoff__1])

constraints.intent: Verify that events exactly at the cutoff are not included by the filter expression before it executes.
All returned timestamps must be strictly greater than the cutoff (now - window).
